title: Property Tests, Algebraic Laws, and Pipeline Diagnostics
description: Prove a normalization and aggregation library across generated changed cases and injected faults. Learners cumulatively produce a law-oriented regression and diagnostics suite through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate concrete examples from general properties and generate boundary-rich cases.
Test identity, associativity, idempotence, or round-trip laws only where contracts claim them.
Attach diagnostic taps at effect boundaries without changing transformed values.
